Recall Heading: Airova Recalls Aroeve Air Purifiers Due to Fire and Burn Hazards
Description: This recall involves Aroeve brand air purifiers, model MK04. The recalled air purifiers come in black or white. The model, date code, and serial number information are printed on the product label located on the bottom of the air purifiers. The air purifiers subject to this recall were manufactured prior to July 2025 and have a serial number starting with “BN”.
Hazard Description: The air purifiers can overheat and ignite, posing fire and burn hazards to consumers.
Incidents: Airova received 37 reports of the air purifiers overheating, including one report of fire. No injuries or property damage have been reported.
Remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled Aroeve air purifiers immediately and contact Airova for a free replacement air purifier.
Sold At: Amazon.com, Shopify.com, TEMU.com, and TikTok.com from September 2024 through June 2025 for between $80 and $134.
